description_long: This is a tall, narrow glass bottle with a yellow screw cap and a colorful label wrapped around its lower half. The label features a combination of red, yellow, and green colors, with Chinese characters and branding prominently displayed on the front. The bottle's body is mostly translucent, allowing some visibility of the contents inside, which appear to be a light brown liquid, likely a condiment such as soy sauce. The cap is metallic and ribbed for grip, and the bottle has a slight taper from the base to the neck. The label includes nutritional information, barcodes, and branding elements, with the front side being the most visually detailed.
description: A tall, translucent glass bottle with a yellow screw cap and a colorful, Chinese-branded label, containing a light brown liquid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with red, yellow, and green branding and Chinese text.
description_view_1: Rear angled view displaying nutritional information and additional label details.
description_view_2: Back view highlighting the barcode, green label section, and more product information.
description_view_3: Side view with green and yellow label sections and partial branding visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: The bottle features a prominent red and yellow label with Chinese characters, a green logo at the neck, and additional nutritional and product information in smaller text on the back and sides. The branding is visually striking and covers most of the lower half of the bottle.
